name: Polvo Frito- Fried Octopus
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the octopus to taste.
2. Finely chop parsley and set aside.
3. Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
4. Cook 1 kg of pre-cooked octopus until golden brown, turning occasionally.
5. Serve with chopped parsley.
From Meryl Constance's column in the Sydney Morning Herald, "Raw Materials". 3/2/93. Courtesy, Mark Herron.
